class.name: RenderCanvasDataRD
class.brief_description: Render data object, holds canvas data related to rendering a single frame of a viewport.
class.description: Canvas data object, exists for the duration of rendering a single viewport. [b]Note:[/b] This is an internal rendering server object. Do not instantiate this class from a script.

method.name: get_backbuffer_texture
method.description: Gets the back-buffer this viewport is being rendered on, only effective when using back-buffering, see [method RenderingServer.canvas_item_set_copy_to_backbuffer].

method.name: get_screen_texture
method.description: Gets the back-buffer this viewport is being rendered on.

method.name: is_using_linear_colors
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when this viewport is using linear colors instead of sRGB, use this to know when to use sRGB version of textures.
